executives.name: Paul Andre Huet
executives.background: Mr. Huet has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He served as Executive Chairman and CEO of Karora Resources. Previously, he was President and CEO of Klondex Mines Ltd. from 2012 to 2018. He has served on several boards including Northwest Copper Corp. and 1911 Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Graeme Sloan
executives.background: Mr. Sloan is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in project development and operations. He was previously Managing Director of Karora and has held senior roles at several Australian mining companies including Tanami Gold NL and Herencia Resources PLC.

executives.name: L-A Musca
executives.background: Ms. Musca is a Chartered Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial management and reporting within the mining sector. She previously held senior financial roles at Gascoyne Resources and other ASX-listed entities.

executives.name: Oliver Turner
executives.background: Mr. Turner has over 15 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in capital markets and corporate development. Prior to Karora, he was Senior Vice President at a Canadian precious metals producer.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Andre Huet
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman and CEO of Karora Resources. Extensive experience in mining operations and corporate leadership.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Goudie
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Goudie has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, particularly in marketing and supply chain management. He held senior executive positions at Vale (formerly Inco Ltd).

board_of_directors.name: Wendy Kei
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kei is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of business experience. She is currently the Chair of the Board of Ontario Power Generation Inc. and serves on the board of Centerra Gold Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin McLean
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McLean has over 30 years of experience in the investment management industry. He was previously a Senior Managing Director at Sprucegrove Investment Management Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Chadwick Williams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Williams is the founder and President of Red Cloud Securities Inc. He has extensive experience in mining finance and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Shirley In't Veld
board_of_directors.background: Ms. In't Veld has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors. She was formerly the CEO of Verve Energy and has served on the boards of Northern Star Resources and Alumina Limited.

sources.source_description: Annual Information Form for the year ended December 31, 2023
